explanation: Replaced the script block syntax with the -Command parameter for equivalent execution. No other changes were necessary as the command is already valid and matches the Sigma rule.
Used double backslashes for path normalization and omitted the -Command parameter since it is implied when no script block is used. This is a valid alternative syntax in PowerShell.
Substituted the long option '-Command' with its short form '-c'. This is a valid and equivalent syntax in PowerShell.
